title: AXDropZoneHoverEvent
description: Event emitted when a draggable element enters or leaves a drop zone.

props.name: sender
props.description: The drop zone directive that emitted the event. Inherited from NXEvent.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native mouse event that triggered the hover. Inherited from NXNativeEvent.

props.name: dropped
props.description: The draggable element that entered or left the zone.

props.name: state
props.description: Indicates whether the element entered ('enter') or left ('leave') the drop zone.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the event with inherited members expanded.
